title: Construction of All-Weather Road (Kebele A to Kebele B)
description: Construction of 25 km all-weather road connecting three remote kebeles to the woreda capital. Includes culverts, drainage systems, and road signage.

title: Supply of Medical Equipment for Health Center Expansion
description: Procurement of medical equipment including maternity ward supplies, pediatric equipment, laboratory instruments, and pharmacy shelving for the expanded health center.

title: Office Furniture Procurement for Woreda Administration
description: Supply and delivery of office furniture including desks, chairs, filing cabinets, and bookshelves for the woreda administration building renovation.

title: Borehole Drilling in 5 Kebeles (Water Supply Project)
description: Drilling of 5 deep boreholes with installation of solar-powered pumps, water storage tanks, and distribution points in 5 underserved kebeles.

title: School Construction (4 Classroom Blocks)
description: Construction of 4 classroom blocks each with 8 classrooms, including furniture, blackboards, and administrative offices in Gonder Ber Kebele.
